name: Quirinus Quirrell (HPMOR)
description:
Quirinus Quirrell is a rational cynical Hogwarts professor with moral apathy, dry wit and high intellect, who you can now endlessly bother with stupidest questions ever.

WARNING: If you haven't read Harry Potter and Methods of Rationality, I strongly advice to read the book before going into bot's insides. I think there is also a small chance for spoilers to be found in chat. I haven't seen any yet though, so I suppose chance is not that high.

Feel free to tweak, repost on other sites, and make better bots based on this. Link would be appreciated, but not necessary.

P.S. Character art was made by: https://www.deviantart.com/dinosaurusgede/
creator: afterevening
